heading: Premiums; late enrollment penalty
label: 1395w–113 Premiums; late enrollment penalty

Effective Date of 2008 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–275, title I, § 114(b)122 Stat. 2507July 15, 2008“The amendments made by this section [amending this section and ] shall apply to subsidies for months beginning with January 2009.”section 1395w–114 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The monthly beneficiary premium for a prescription drug plan is the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) or (8) (as applicable) as adjusted under this paragraph.

children.heading: Adjustment to reflect difference between bid and national average bid
children.label: B Adjustment to reflect difference between bid and national average bid

children.heading: Above average bid
children.label: i Above average bid
children.text: If for a month the amount of the standardized bid amount (as defined in paragraph (5)) exceeds the amount of the adjusted national average monthly bid amount (as defined in clause (iii)), the base beneficiary premium for the month shall be increased by the amount of such excess.

children.heading: Below average bid
children.label: ii Below average bid
children.text: If for a month the amount of the adjusted national average monthly bid amount for the month exceeds the standardized bid amount, the base beneficiary premium for the month shall be decreased by the amount of such excess.

children.heading: Adjusted national average monthly bid amount defined
children.label: iii Adjusted national average monthly bid amount defined
children.text: For purposes of this subparagraph, the term “adjusted national average monthly bid amount” means the national average monthly bid amount computed under paragraph (4), as adjusted under .section 1395w–115(c)(2) of this title

children.heading: Increase for supplemental prescription drug benefits
children.label: C Increase for supplemental prescription drug benefits
children.text: The base beneficiary premium shall be increased by the portion of the PDP approved bid that is attributable to supplemental prescription drug benefits.

children.heading: Increase for late enrollment penalty
children.label: D Increase for late enrollment penalty
children.text: The base beneficiary premium shall be increased by the amount of any late enrollment penalty under subsection (b).

children.heading: Decrease for low-income assistance
children.label: E Decrease for low-income assistance
children.text: The monthly beneficiary premium is subject to decrease in the case of a subsidy eligible individual under .section 1395w–114 of this title

children.heading: Increase based on income
children.label: F Increase based on income
children.text: The monthly beneficiary premium shall be increased pursuant to paragraph (7).

children.heading: Uniform premium
children.label: G Uniform premium
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraphs (D), (E), and (F), the monthly beneficiary premium for a prescription drug plan in a PDP region is the same for all part D eligible individuals enrolled in the plan.

children.label: A
children.text: the beneficiary premium percentage (as specified in paragraph (3)); and

children.label: B
children.text: the national average monthly bid amount (computed under paragraph (4)) for the month.

children.label: A
children.text: the numerator of which is 25.5 percent (or, for 2030 and each subsequent year, the percent specified under paragraph (9)); and

children.label: i
children.text: the total reinsurance payments which the Secretary estimates are payable under with respect to the coverage year; divided bysection 1395w–115(b) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: the amount estimated under clause (i) for the year; and

children.label: II
children.text: the total payments which the Secretary estimates will be paid to prescription drug plans and MA–PD plans that are attributable to the standardized bid amount during the year, taking into account amounts paid by the Secretary and enrollees.

children.heading: Computation of national average monthly bid amount
children.label: 4 Computation of national average monthly bid amount

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: For each year (beginning with 2006) the Secretary shall compute a national average monthly bid amount equal to the average of the standardized bid amounts (as defined in paragraph (5)) for each prescription drug plan and for each MA–PD plan described in . Such average does not take into account the bids submitted for MSA plans, MA private fee-for-service plan, and specialized MA plans for special needs individuals, PACE programs under (pursuant to ), and under reasonable cost reimbursement contracts under (pursuant to ).section 1395w–21(a)(2)(A)(i) of this titlesection 1395eee of this titlesection 1395w–131(f) of this titlesection 1395mm(h) of this titlesection 1395w–131(e) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: The monthly national average monthly bid amount computed under subparagraph (A) for a year shall be a weighted average, with the weight for each plan being equal to the average number of part D eligible individuals enrolled in such plan in the reference month (as defined in ).section 1395w–27a(f)(4) of this title

children.heading: Special rule for 2006
children.label: ii Special rule for 2006
children.text: For purposes of applying this paragraph for 2006, the Secretary shall establish procedures for determining the weighted average under clause (i) for 2005.

children.heading: Basic coverage
children.label: i Basic coverage
children.text: In the case of a prescription drug plan that provides basic prescription drug coverage, the PDP approved bid (as defined in paragraph (6)).

children.heading: Supplemental coverage
children.label: ii Supplemental coverage
children.text: In the case of a prescription drug plan that provides supplemental prescription drug coverage, the portion of the PDP approved bid that is attributable to basic prescription drug coverage.

children.heading: MA–PD plans
children.label: B MA–PD plans
children.text: In the case of an MA–PD plan, the portion of the accepted bid amount that is attributable to basic prescription drug coverage.

children.heading: PDP approved bid defined
children.label: 6 PDP approved bid defined
children.text: For purposes of this part, the term “PDP approved bid” means, with respect to a prescription drug plan, the bid amount approved for the plan under this part.

children.heading: Increase in base beneficiary premium based on income
children.label: 7 Increase in base beneficiary premium based on income

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In the case of an individual whose modified adjusted gross income exceeds the threshold amount applicable under paragraph (2) of (including application of paragraph (5) of such section) for the calendar year, the monthly amount of the beneficiary premium applicable under this section for a month after December 2010 shall be increased by the monthly adjustment amount specified in subparagraph (B).section 1395r(i) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: the applicable percentage determined under paragraph (3)(C) of (including application of paragraph (5) of such section) for the individual for the calendar year reduced by 25.5 percent (or, for 2030 and each subsequent year, the percent specified under paragraph (9)); bysection 1395r(i) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: 25.5 percent (or, for 2030 and each subsequent year, the percent specified under paragraph (9)); and

children.label: ii
children.text: the base beneficiary premium (as computed under paragraph (2) or (8) (as applicable)).

children.heading: Modified adjusted gross income
children.label: C Modified adjusted gross income
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “modified adjusted gross income” has the meaning given such term in subparagraph (A) of , determined for the taxable year applicable under subparagraphs (B) and (C) of such section.section 1395r(i)(4) of this title

children.heading: Determination by Commissioner of Social Security
children.label: D Determination by Commissioner of Social Security
children.text: The Commissioner of Social Security shall make any determination necessary to carry out the income-related increase in the base beneficiary premium under this paragraph.

children.heading: Procedures to assure correct income-related increase in base beneficiary premium
children.label: E Procedures to assure correct income-related increase in base beneficiary premium

children.heading: Disclosure of base beneficiary premium
children.label: i Disclosure of base beneficiary premium
children.text: Not later than September 15 of each year beginning with 2010, the Secretary shall disclose to the Commissioner of Social Security the amount of the base beneficiary premium (as computed under paragraph (2) or (8) (as applicable)) for the purpose of carrying out the income-related increase in the base beneficiary premium under this paragraph with respect to the following year.

children.label: I
children.text: The modified adjusted gross income threshold applicable under paragraph (2) of (including application of paragraph (5) of such section).section 1395r(i) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: The applicable percentage determined under paragraph (3)(C) of (including application of paragraph (5) of such section).section 1395r(i) of this title

children.label: III
children.text: The monthly adjustment amount specified in subparagraph (B).

children.label: IV
children.text: Any other information the Commissioner of Social Security determines necessary to carry out the income-related increase in the base beneficiary premium under this paragraph.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: F Rule of construction
children.text: The formula used to determine the monthly adjustment amount specified under subparagraph (B) shall only be used for the purpose of determining such monthly adjustment amount under such subparagraph.

children.label: I
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2023 increased by 6 percent; or

children.label: II
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2024 that would have applied if this paragraph had not been enacted.

children.label: I
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under clause (i) for a month in 2024 increased by 6 percent; or

children.label: II
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2025 that would have applied if this paragraph had not been enacted.

children.label: I
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under clause (ii) for a month in 2025 increased by 6 percent; or

children.label: II
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2026 that would have applied if this paragraph had not been enacted.

children.label: I
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under clause (iii) for a month in 2026 increased by 6 percent; or

children.label: II
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2027 that would have applied if this paragraph had not been enacted.

children.label: I
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under clause (iv) for a month in 2027 increased by 6 percent; or

children.label: II
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2028 that would have applied if this paragraph had not been enacted.

children.label: I
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under clause (v) for a month in 2028 increased by 6 percent; or

children.label: II
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2029 that would have applied if this paragraph had not been enacted.

children.heading: Clarification regarding 2030 and subsequent years
children.label: B Clarification regarding 2030 and subsequent years
children.text: The base beneficiary premium for a month in 2030 or a subsequent year shall be computed under paragraph (2) without regard to this paragraph.

children.label: i
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (8)(A)(vi) for a month in 2029 increased by 6 percent; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the base beneficiary premium computed under paragraph (2) for a month in 2030 that would have applied if this paragraph had not been enacted.

children.heading: Floor
children.label: B Floor
children.text: The percent specified under subparagraph (A) may not be less than 20 percent.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to the succeeding provisions of this subsection, in the case of a part D eligible individual described in paragraph (2) with respect to a continuous period of eligibility, there shall be an increase in the monthly beneficiary premium established under subsection (a) in an amount determined under paragraph (3).

children.heading: Individuals subject to penalty
children.label: 2 Individuals subject to penalty
children.text: A part D eligible individual described in this paragraph is, with respect to a continuous period of eligibility, an individual for whom there is a continuous period of 63 days or longer (all of which in such continuous period of eligibility) beginning on the day after the last date of the individual’s initial enrollment period under and ending on the date of enrollment under a prescription drug plan or MA–PD plan during all of which the individual was not covered under any creditable prescription drug coverage.section 1395w–101(b)(2) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: an amount that the Secretary determines is actuarially sound for each uncovered month (as defined in subparagraph (B)) in the same continuous period of eligibility; or

children.label: ii
children.text: 1 percent of the base beneficiary premium (computed under paragraph (2) or (8) of subsection (a) (as applicable)) for each such uncovered month in such period.

children.heading: Uncovered month defined
children.label: B Uncovered month defined
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “uncovered month” means, with respect to a part D eligible individual, any month beginning after the end of the initial enrollment period under unless the individual can demonstrate that the individual had creditable prescription drug coverage (as defined in paragraph (4)) for any portion of such month.section 1395w–101(b)(2) of this title

children.heading: Coverage under prescription drug plan or MA–PD plan
children.label: A Coverage under prescription drug plan or MA–PD plan
children.text: Coverage under a prescription drug plan or under an MA–PD plan.

children.heading: Medicaid
children.label: B Medicaid
children.text: Coverage under a medicaid plan under subchapter XIX or under a waiver under .section 1315 of this title

children.heading: Group health plan
children.label: C Group health plan
children.text: Coverage under a group health plan, including a health benefits plan under chapter 89 of title 5 (commonly known as the Federal employees health benefits program), and a qualified retiree prescription drug plan (as defined in ).section 1395w–132(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: State pharmaceutical assistance program
children.label: D State pharmaceutical assistance program
children.text: Coverage under a State pharmaceutical assistance program described in .section 1395w–133(b)(1) of this title

children.heading: Veterans’ coverage of prescription drugs
children.label: E Veterans’ coverage of prescription drugs
children.text: Coverage for veterans, and survivors and dependents of veterans, under chapter 17 of title 38.

children.heading: Prescription drug coverage under medigap policies
children.label: F Prescription drug coverage under medigap policies
children.text: Coverage under a medicare supplemental policy under that provides benefits for prescription drugs (whether or not such coverage conforms to the standards for packages of benefits under ).section 1395ss of this titlesection 1395ss(p)(1) of this title

children.heading: Military coverage (including TRICARE)
children.label: G Military coverage (including TRICARE)
children.text: Coverage under chapter 55 of title 10.

children.heading: Other coverage
children.label: H Other coverage
children.text: Such other coverage as the Secretary determines appropriate.

children.heading: Actuarial equivalence requirement
children.label: 5 Actuarial equivalence requirement
children.text: Coverage meets the requirement of this paragraph only if the coverage is determined (in a manner specified by the Secretary) to provide coverage of the cost of prescription drugs the actuarial value of which (as defined by the Secretary) to the individual equals or exceeds the actuarial value of standard prescription drug coverage (as determined under ).section 1395w–111(c) of this title

children.heading: Procedures to document creditable prescription drug coverage
children.label: 6 Procedures to document creditable prescription drug coverage

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures (including the form, manner, and time) for the documentation of creditable prescription drug coverage, including procedures to assist in determining whether coverage meets the requirement of paragraph (5).

children.heading: Disclosure by entities offering creditable prescription drug coverage
children.label: B Disclosure by entities offering creditable prescription drug coverage

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Each entity that offers prescription drug coverage of the type described in subparagraphs (B) through (H) of paragraph (4) shall provide for disclosure, in a form, manner, and time consistent with standards established by the Secretary, to the Secretary and part D eligible individuals of whether the coverage meets the requirement of paragraph (5) or whether such coverage is changed so it no longer meets such requirement.

children.heading: Disclosure of non-creditable coverage
children.label: ii Disclosure of non-creditable coverage
children.text: In the case of such coverage that does not meet such requirement, the disclosure to part D eligible individuals under this subparagraph shall include information regarding the fact that because such coverage does not meet such requirement there are limitations on the periods in a year in which the individuals may enroll under a prescription drug plan or an MA–PD plan and that any such enrollment is subject to a late enrollment penalty under this subsection.

children.heading: Waiver of requirement
children.label: C Waiver of requirement
children.text: In the case of a part D eligible individual who was enrolled in prescription drug coverage of the type described in subparagraphs (B) through (H) of paragraph (4) which is not creditable prescription drug coverage because it does not meet the requirement of paragraph (5), the individual may apply to the Secretary to have such coverage treated as creditable prescription drug coverage if the individual establishes that the individual was not adequately informed that such coverage did not meet such requirement.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), for purposes of this subsection, the term “continuous period of eligibility” means, with respect to a part D eligible individual, the period that begins with the first day on which the individual is eligible to enroll in a prescription drug plan under this part and ends with the individual’s death.

children.label: i
children.text: which terminated in or before the month preceding the month in which the individual attained age 65; or

children.label: ii
children.text: for which the basis for eligibility for such entitlement changed between and , between 426(b) of this title and , or between and ,section 426(b) of this titlesection 426(a) of this title2section 426–1 of this titlesection 426–1 of this titlesection 426(a) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “section 426(b)”.2

children.heading: Waiver of penalty for subsidy-eligible individuals
children.label: 8 Waiver of penalty for subsidy-eligible individuals
children.text: In no case shall a part D eligible individual who is determined to be a subsidy eligible individual (as defined in ) be subject to an increase in the monthly beneficiary premium established under subsection (a).section 1395w–114(a)(3) of this title

children.heading: Collection of monthly beneficiary premiums
children.label: c Collection of monthly beneficiary premiums

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraphs (2), (3), and (4), the provisions of shall apply to PDP sponsors and premiums (and any late enrollment penalty) under this part in the same manner as they apply to MA organizations and beneficiary premiums under part C, except that any reference to a Trust Fund is deemed for this purpose a reference to the Medicare Prescription Drug Account.section 1395w–24(d) of this title

children.heading: Portion attributable to increased actuarial costs
children.label: A Portion attributable to increased actuarial costs
children.text: With respect to late enrollment penalties imposed under subsection (b), the Secretary shall specify the portion of such a penalty that the Secretary estimates is attributable to increased actuarial costs assumed by the PDP sponsor or MA organization (and not taken into account through risk adjustment provided under or through reinsurance payments under ) as a result of such late enrollment.section 1395w–115(c)(1) of this titlesection 1395w–115(b) of this title

children.heading: Collection through withholding
children.label: B Collection through withholding
children.text: In the case of a late enrollment penalty that is collected from a part D eligible individual in the manner described in , the Secretary shall provide that only the portion of such penalty estimated under subparagraph (A) shall be paid to the PDP sponsor or MA organization offering the part D plan in which the individual is enrolled.section 1395w–24(d)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Collection by plan
children.label: C Collection by plan
children.text: In the case of a late enrollment penalty that is collected from a part D eligible individual in a manner other than the manner described in , the Secretary shall establish procedures for reducing payments otherwise made to the PDP sponsor or MA organization by an amount equal to the amount of such penalty less the portion of such penalty estimated under subparagraph (A).section 1395w–24(d)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Fallback plans
children.label: 3 Fallback plans
children.text: In applying this subsection in the case of a fallback prescription drug plan, paragraph (2) shall not apply and the monthly beneficiary premium shall be collected in the manner specified in (or such other manner as may be provided under in the case of monthly premiums under ).section 1395w–24(d)(2)(A) of this titlesection 1395s of this titlesection 1395r of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any provision of this subsection or , subject to subparagraph (B), the amount of the income-related increase in the base beneficiary premium for an individual for a month (as determined under subsection (a)(7)) shall be paid through withholding from benefit payments in the manner provided under .section 1395w–24(d)(2) of this titlesection 1395s of this title

children.heading: Agreements
children.label: B Agreements
children.text: In the case where the monthly benefit payments of an individual that are withheld under subparagraph (A) are insufficient to pay the amount described in such subparagraph, the Commissioner of Social Security shall enter into agreements with the Secretary, the Director of the Office of Personnel Management, and the Railroad Retirement Board as necessary in order to allow other agencies to collect the amount described in subparagraph (A) that was not withheld under such subparagraph.
